identity: Human male stormcaller, young adult, messy wind-swept dark brown hair, dark brown eyes, intense focused expression, faint blue lightning arcing across the skin and hair.
outfit: Deep blue hooded cloak or jacket with gold-orange trim along the front seam, hood down.
weapons: No staff — conjures lightning with bare hands. Blue lightning bolts crackle around his fists and shoulders.
attackStyle: East-facing. Right hand thrust forward hurling a forked blue lightning bolt, left hand drawn back, cloak whipping in the wind.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised at shoulder height with arcs of blue lightning jumping between the palms, hair standing up from static.
blockStyle: East-facing. Arms crossed in front of the chest, a crackling dome of blue lightning around the body.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, lightning extinguished, head bowed, cloak slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), intense idle. Both hands at the sides, small blue sparks flickering at the fingertips, dark hair wind-blown.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Messy wind-swept dark brown hair, intense face, deep blue cloak with gold-orange trim, blue lightning arcing around the shoulders and collar.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male stormcaller, young adult, messy wind-swept dark brown hair, dark brown eyes, intense focused expression, faint blue lightning arcing across the skin and hair.

OUTFIT: Deep blue hooded cloak or jacket with gold-orange trim along the front seam, hood down.

WEAPONS: No staff — conjures lightning with bare hands. Blue lightning bolts crackle around his fists and shoulders.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male stormcaller, young adult, messy wind-swept dark brown hair, dark brown eyes, intense focused expression, faint blue lightning arcing across the skin and hair.

OUTFIT: Deep blue hooded cloak or jacket with gold-orange trim along the front seam, hood down.

WEAPONS: No staff — conjures lightning with bare hands. Blue lightning bolts crackle around his fists and shoulders.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Messy wind-swept dark brown hair, intense face, deep blue cloak with gold-orange trim, blue lightning arcing around the shoulders and collar.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
